capabilities.name: Employee self-service portal
capabilities.notes: Account portal exposes employee self-service: src/pages/account/{LeavePage,AttendancePage,MySkillsPage,PerformancePage,MyContractsPage}.tsx gated by useEmployeeSelf.

capabilities.name: Bank/tax/emergency contact data
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): manage_employee update stored emergency_contact={name,phone,relation}, tax_rate_pct=31, personal_number — all read back verbatim via get, then restored/cleared cleanly (jsonb {} and null round-trip). Fields: employees.emergency_contact (jsonb), tax_rate_pct, personal_number, birth_date, monthly_salary_cents. bank/tax/emergency contact data fields exist
capabilities.notes: employees table has emergency_contact (jsonb), tax_rate_pct, personal_number (baseline.sql:14044-14053); no employee bank/disbursement account field. Operator-usability note: update identifies by 'id' (not 'employee_id') — the error message self-corrects the caller.

capabilities.name: Salary grades/scales
capabilities.verify: salary_grades table + employees.salary_grade_id + manage_salary_grade skill (create/update/delete/list/assign/compliance with compa-ratio) + CompensationPanel tab on HRPage (20260708110000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: grade created (band 25000-35000), assign reported in_band=true, compliance flagged above_band with compa_ratio 1.4 after a raise.

capabilities.name: Benefits/allowances
capabilities.verify: benefit_plans + employee_benefits + manage_benefits skill (create_plan/update_plan/list_plans/enroll/end_enrollment/list_enrollments/summary) + CompensationPanel on HRPage; employee self-read RLS for the portal (20260708110000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: plan created, enrolled, duplicate active enrollment rejected (partial unique index), summary totalled employer cost, enrollment ended.

capabilities.name: Training/course catalog
capabilities.verify: training_courses + training_enrollments + manage_training skill (create_course/update_course/list_courses/enroll/complete/cancel/list_enrollments; complete can award a certifications row with expiry from valid_months) + TrainingPanel on HRPage (20260708110000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: course created, enrolled, completed with certification written to the existing certifications table (found+fixed column drift issued_date/expires_at live).

capabilities.name: Disciplinary/warnings
capabilities.verify: disciplinary_actions + manage_disciplinary skill (create/update/acknowledge/resolve/withdraw/get/list, trust=approve for sensitive HR data, admin-only RLS) + DisciplinaryPanel on HRPage (20260708110000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07 through the staged-approval gateway flow: verbal warning created and acknowledged (status flow open->acknowledged).

capabilities.name: Shift scheduling/roster
capabilities.verify: shifts table + manage_shift skill (create/update/assign/delete/list/roster; overlap guard, open shifts) + ShiftsPanel weekly roster on HRPage; employee self-read RLS (20260708110000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: shift created, overlapping second shift rejected with explicit error, open shift listed, roster returned per-employee total_hours 7.5 (break deducted).
